strengths: Deep expertise in backend, distributed systems, microservices, and real-time data processing.
Demonstrated commitment to engineering quality through TDD, CI/CD, and open-source contributions.
Recent, relevant exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and frameworks for workflow support.
concerns: Limited executive-level leadership experience and no track record of scaling engineering teams (10-30+).
Insufficient demonstrated production experience with multi-agent AI systems, LLM specifics, and AI-native fintech.
Lack of explicit experience in regulated financial environments with compliance and auditability.
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong technical capabilities in backend and distributed systems, with some recent exposure to AI agent infrastructure. However, the role is an executive CTO position requiring extensive leadership experience scaling engineering teams, deep production expertise in multi-agent AI systems, and familiarity with regulated fintech environments, areas where the candidate's resume shows significant gaps for this level of seniority.
